name: loreweaver-uploader
description: Design, validate, import, playtest, and publish living worlds and character experiences for LoreWeaver AI.

interface.shortDescription: Design, validate, convert, and publish LoreWeaver worlds.
interface.longDescription: A complete LoreWeaver creation toolkit for worlds and character experiences. Designs structured lore and LoreMap relationships; authors and tests Loom Engine systems; losslessly round-trips native LoreWeaver lore and Loom JSON; converts FictionLab, Character Card, SillyTavern, and lorebook formats; detects canon, retrieval, graph, and context problems; generates QA reports, playtests, diffs, and version snapshots; prepares privacy-safe public copies; and safely imports, updates, playtests, or publishes through the authenticated LoreWeaver web app.
defaultPrompt: Help me design a new LoreWeaver world from an idea.
Turn this world bible into structured LoreWeaver lore cards.
Build and validate Loom Engine logic for this adventure.
